Class SbmParameters

java.lang.Object
io.sbk.params.impl.SbkInputOptions
io.sbm.params.impl.SbmParameters
All Implemented Interfaces:
io.sbk.params.ActionParameter, io.sbk.params.InputOptions, io.sbk.params.ParsedOptions, io.sbk.params.ParseInputOptions, RamParameterOptions, RamParameters
public final class SbmParameters extends io.sbk.params.impl.SbkInputOptions implements RamParameterOptions
Parses SBM server command-line parameters and exposes typed getters.

Extends SbkInputOptions to register SBM-specific options such as storage class, logger selection, action, port, max connections, and idle sleep. Validates inputs and maps values for use by the SBM runtime and loggers.

  • Constructor Details

    • SbmParameters

      public SbmParameters(String name, int port, int maxConnections, int idleMS, String[] loggerNames)
      Construct parameter parser and register SBM options.
      Parameters:
      name - application/usage header used in help
      port - default port for SBM server
      maxConnections - default maximum concurrent client connections
      idleMS - default idle sleep in milliseconds
      loggerNames - available logger class names to show in help

  • Method Details

    • parseArgs
